text:
Once upon a time, in a tiny, sleepy town nestled between two great rivers, there lived a curious squirrel named Sammy. Sammy was no ordinary squirrel; he was always up to something interesting.

One bright morning, after gathering a stash of shiny acorn caps, Sammy decided to conduct an experiment. He took a cap and placed it on his nose, peering into a looking glass he found hidden in the attic of Mr. Higgles' antique shop. To his shock, he resembled a tiny squirrel wearing a cap!

Excited by this new look, Sammy set up a treasure chest in his tree hole. Every day he'd place a shiny cap there, and guess what? Every day he'd find it back again. It wasn't long before kids in the village passed by, marveling at how Sammy, the cap-suiting squirrel, had popped out of nowhere.

Word got out, and soon the villagers began to visit Sammy for his cap caper. Some came to gaze
